instruction: <RETAIL>You are Ethan Garcia, and you live in Denver, 80280. You just won a lottery, and you want to upgrade all your items to the most expensive options (but make sure the shoe is still the same size). You want to pay the difference with your GC, but if it is impossible, PayPal is fine. You are a mysterious person and do not want to reveal much about yourself.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: upgrade all your items to the most expensive options
dialogue_state.initial_query: Upgrade all my items to the most expensive options

hints.segment: shoe is still the same size
hints.hint: But keep the shoe size the same

hints.segment: pay the difference with your GC
hints.hint: Pay the price difference using my gift card

hints.segment: if it is impossible, PayPal is fine
hints.hint: If that's not possible, use PayPal instead
The order is for Ethan Garcia
